title: Custom Photo Moon Lamp – 3D Printed Personalized Night Light with Photo & Coordinates | Best Gift for Loved Ones
material: PLA filament, LED module, wooden base
metaTitle: Custom Photo Moon Lamp – 3D Printed Personalized Gift with Photo & Coordinates
metaDescription: Create a unique custom photo moon lamp with your favorite photo or coordinates. 3D printed, LED-lit, wooden base. Perfect personalized gift. Order now!
shortDescription: Personalized 3D printed moon lamp with your photo & coordinates. LED-lit, wooden base. Unique gift for any occasion.
fullDescription:
**Bring the moon closer to your heart with our Custom Photo Moon Lamp.**

Imagine holding the moon in your hands, etched with your most cherished memory. Whether it’s a beloved photo, a special date, or the exact coordinates of a meaningful place, this personalized moon lamp transforms your story into a glowing work of art.

**Why you’ll love it:**
- **Fully Customizable:** Upload your photo or provide coordinates, and we’ll 3D print them onto the moon’s surface. Every lamp is one-of-a-kind.
- **Premium Materials:** Made from eco-friendly PLA filament, a warm LED module, and a sleek wooden base – safe, durable, and beautiful.
- **Perfect Size:** 5.5 inches (14 cm) in diameter – fits perfectly on a nightstand, desk, or shelf.
- **Warm, Soothing Glow:** The soft LED light creates a cozy ambiance, ideal for bedtime or as a calming night light.

**How it works:**
1. Choose your customization option (photo or coordinates).
2. Upload your image or enter your coordinates during checkout.
3. We handcraft your lamp with care (production takes 5-7 days).
4. Receive a beautifully packaged, ready-to-gift lamp.

**Perfect for every occasion:**
- Birthdays, anniversaries, weddings, Valentine’s Day, Mother’s Day, or just because.
- A romantic gift for your partner, a heartfelt present for parents, or a unique keepsake for friends.

**What’s included:**
- 1x Custom Photo Moon Lamp
- 1x Wooden Base
- 1x USB LED Module (cable included)

**Note:** Due to the custom nature, please allow 5-7 days production time. Each lamp is made to order just for you.
